title: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Projectile hits Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant; Saudi to host Arab, Islamic ministers on regional security
content:
Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant has been hit by a projectile.
*   This incident unfolds amidst ongoing tensions and "war news" involving the US, Israel, and Iran.
*   Saudi Arabia is scheduled to host Arab and Islamic ministers to discuss regional security.

title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: EC tightens grip on Bengal polls with strategic officer transfers as Trinamool faces protests over denial of tickets
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Election Commission (EC) is strategically transferring officers to assert tighter control over the upcoming Bengal assembly elections.
*   The Trinamool Congress (TMC) is currently facing internal protests.
*   These protests stem from party members' anger over the denial of election tickets.

title: Maharashtra government to issue ban on use of plastic flowers
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Maharashtra government plans to issue a ban on plastic flowers.
*   The directive specifically targets the use of these non-biodegradable decorative items.
*   This upcoming regulation will prohibit their use within the state of Maharashtra.

title: Election officials seize 53 panchaloha idols, unaccounted cash in Vellore, nearby districts
content:
Election officials have seized 53 panchaloha idols and unaccounted cash.
*   The seizures took place across Vellore and nearby districts.
*   The discovery suggests potential election-related malpractice or illicit activities.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Three-way firefight in Pala
content:
Anticipation is building for the 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections.
*   The Pala constituency is specifically highlighted as a key battleground.
*   The contest in Pala is expected to be a "three-way firefight," indicating a fierce competition between three major contenders.

title: Mahalakshmi scheme provides ₹280 crore free bus trips for women
content:
The Mahalakshmi scheme provides free bus trips.
*   This benefit is exclusively for women.
*   The total value of these free trips amounts to ₹280 crore.

title: Jharkhand money laundering case: ED files fifth supplementary Prosecution Complaint involving former Minister Alamgir Alam
content:
The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has filed its fifth supplementary Prosecution Complaint.
*   This latest complaint is part of the ongoing money laundering case in Jharkhand.
*   The filing specifically involves former Minister Alamgir Alam.

title: Odisha Congress to pursue alleged attempts to bribe its MLAs in Karnataka before Rajya Sabha election
content:
Odisha Congress plans to investigate alleged attempts to bribe its Members of Legislative Assembly (MLAs).
*   These alleged bribery attempts occurred in Karnataka.
*   The incident took place before the upcoming Rajya Sabha election.

title: New model of security and development established in U.P. in last nine years: Adityanath
content:
Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Adityanath has stated a "new model" has been established in the state.
*   This model integrates both security measures and development initiatives.
*   The establishment of this model has occurred in Uttar Pradesh over the last nine years.

title: Karnataka Information Commission brings Apex Bank under RTI Act
content:
The Karnataka Information Commission (KIC) has issued a ruling.
*   This decision brings the "Apex Bank" (referring to a top financial institution, likely the RBI in an Indian context) under its purview.
*   Consequently, the Apex Bank is now subject to the provisions of the Right to Information (RTI) Act.
